title: Everlasto 'Red Wrapper' UK Made Quality Waxed Cotton Sash Cord No.2 (6mm) x 10M
features: GENUINE 'EVERLASTO' - the long established name for sash cord in the UK.
STRONG - made with a high tenacity non-stretch polypropylene core to give this cord high load bearing capabilities.
WEATHERPROOF and ROT-PROOF - made with a 16 plait braided waxed cotton outer to ensure this cord will not rot when exposed to the elements.
SMOOTH - the waxed cotton finish of this cord will ensure it runs smoothly in pulley systems so windows can slide easily in their runners.
VERSATILE - as well as being used as a sash cord this cord can also be used as a weatherproof clothesline or with racking and pulley systems.
description: 6mm x 10m – Everlasto No.2 Red Wrapper waxed cotton sash cord. Superior quality sash cords made from natural cotton fibres in a 16 plait construction. Has a strong polypropylene core and a waxed cotton outer for extra durability. Ideal for use with traditional sash windows, but can also be used with racing, pulley systems, or as a traditional clothes line. Break Strain – 350kg (approx). Made in UK by James Lever, Bolton.
